features.name: Fast Hands
features.description: Use the Cunning Action bonus action to make a Sleight of Hand check, use thieves' tools to disarm a trap or open a lock, or take the Use an Object action.

features.name: Second-Story Work
features.description: Climbing no longer costs you extra movement, and your running jump distance increases by your Dexterity modifier in feet.

features.name: Supreme Sneak
features.description: You have advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks if you move no more than half your speed on the same turn.

features.name: Use Magic Device
features.description: You ignore all class, race, and level requirements on the use of magic items.

features.name: Thief's Reflexes
features.description: Take two turns during the first round of any combat: your normal turn, and a second turn at your initiative minus 10. You can't use this feature when surprised.

featureChoices.name: Expertise
featureChoices.description: Your proficiency bonus is doubled for the chosen skills.

featureChoices.name: Expertise
featureChoices.description: Your proficiency bonus is doubled for the chosen skills.

features.name: Expertise
features.description: Double your proficiency bonus for two chosen skill proficiencies (or one skill and thieves' tools); two more at 6th level.

features.name: Sneak Attack
features.description: Once per turn, deal extra damage to one creature you hit with an attack with a finesse or ranged weapon if you have advantage, or if another enemy of the target is within 5 feet of it and you don't have disadvantage. The extra damage is 1d6 per two rogue levels (rounded up).

features.name: Thieves' Cant
features.description: You know the secret rogue mix of dialect, jargon, and code, and understand the secret signs used to convey short hidden messages.

features.name: Cunning Action
features.description: Take a bonus action on each of your turns to Dash, Disengage, or Hide.

features.name: Uncanny Dodge
features.description: When an attacker you can see hits you with an attack, use your reaction to halve the attack's damage against you.

features.name: Evasion
features.description: When subjected to an effect that allows a Dexterity saving throw for half damage, you take no damage on a success and only half on a failure.

features.name: Reliable Talent
features.description: Whenever you make an ability check that uses a proficient skill, treat a d20 roll of 9 or lower as a 10.

features.name: Blindsense
features.description: If you can hear, you are aware of the location of any hidden or invisible creature within 10 feet of you.

features.name: Slippery Mind
features.description: You gain proficiency in Wisdom saving throws.

features.name: Elusive
features.description: No attack roll has advantage against you while you aren't incapacitated.

features.name: Stroke of Luck
features.description: Turn a missed attack against a target within range into a hit, or treat a failed ability check as a natural 20. Once used, you must finish a short or long rest before using it again.
